# Typography

## What this covers

- Type-scale tokens and line-height pairings.

### token/heading-line-height-pairing

Pair heading type tokens with the matching line-height token.

| Bad | Good | Why |
|---|---|---|
| `type=body lh=tight` | `type=body lh=relaxed` | body needs 1.5+ line-height |

Source: https://example-ds.test/foundations/typography#scale
